title: Another Kind of Cat
content:
Actually, they're real cat, two of them -- the mother and the kitten.

I've seen the mother cat walking around for quite a while already. Actually, she had one kitten back in August.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/10/cat_kitten_01.jpg)

Cut back to present time, she just had another kitten. The little cat is still very tiny.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/10/cat_kitten_02.jpg)

The mother cat doesn't really want to be friend with me when she doesn't have kitten. So I don't think she is in the mood to get to know me right now.

Adorable, don't you think?
